_comment: Operator-approved, evidence-backed play assignments and changes. The play-consistency gate (src/play-consistency.js) FAILS CLOSED on any manifest<->CRM play conflict unless a matching approved decision here authorizes it. A decision is not a way to make numbers agree — it records the evidence that justifies the play, with the buyer and disqualifier reasoning. from_play may be null for a first assignment.

decisions.rationale: Resolved from evidence, not to force manifest/CRM agreement. Public trigger: 'AI Segmentation Is Here' (2026-04-21) — a microsegmentation / zero-trust security vendor scaling with public growth and customer proof. Intended buyer is Chris Boehm, Field CTO (sourcing router: Benny Lakunishok, Co-Founder/CEO) — CTO-level infrastructure owners. The sourcing hypothesis already frames the fit as GNK's 'rescue and hardening lanes'. GNK-DATA-01 REJECTED: it targets an operations-heavy company with an internal spreadsheet/manual-handoff workflow and a Director of Business Systems/Operations buyer; there is no evidence of an internal ops-automation pain and the buyer is a Field CTO — wrong target and wrong buyer. GNK-AI-01 CONSIDERED but REJECTED: its target is a client whose AI workflow is not yet production-safe, but Zero Networks' AI Segmentation is a GA commercial product and core IP with no pre-production gap for GNK to close, and a security vendor will not outsource the core of its own security-AI product (trips the 'prototype/demo only' disqualifier, inverted). GNK-BE-01 CHOSEN: business-critical security infrastructure at scale, buyer alignment (CTO/VP-Eng/Platform Lead), and a bounded backend-hardening outcome that does not require handing over product IP. This coincides with the existing CRM play, but the decision stands on the evidence above.

The legacy CRM import also sourced Zero Networks under GNK-AI-01 (a duplicate lead). That assignment is superseded by the GNK-BE-01 decision above: Zero Networks' AI Segmentation is a shipped GA product and core IP, so there is no pre-production AI workflow for GNK to productionize (GNK-AI-01's target). The bounded, defensible engagement is backend risk/stabilization on their scaling zero-trust enforcement infrastructure (GNK-BE-01), consistent with the Field-CTO buyer. Recorded so the fail-closed play-consistency gate reconciles the AI-01 duplicate rather than silently ignoring it. NOTE: the underlying duplicate Zero Networks leads are a legacy-import data-quality issue slated for first-class account dedup in PR#7.
